reviews.review_text: The only difference between sleeping in a Rest Area and here is that here they charge you $50 for a 2m2 site. Staff were nice but the sites are super tiny and noise from trucks/trains/airplanes during the night is horrible. Been traveling arround australia for over an year and this was de worst place we’ve stayed in.
Beautiful pool, great owners, currently undergoing a lot maintence but enjoyable stay.
Good location, quiet and clean caravan park.
Fabulous park and great staff!
Very friendly a positive staff and everything done right, thoroughly enjoyed my stay,
Lovely little Caravan Park but no ensuites for Caravans. Plenty of new cabins with more to come
Great caravan park. Easy access.

Staff are all really friendly and helpful. They are a real credit to the park. I stayed in the unit type room had everything I needed comfy bed , great airconditioner and a full size fridge. Short stroll to the amenities block which was always clean.
Definitely surprised me in the best way possible. Will stay again.

Highly recommend this caravan park. Staff could not be anymore friendly and obliging.
Grounds and amenities were spotless.
Would definitely recommend.

Best caravan park to stay in townshill the people that run it are so friendly and helpful I recommend this Caravan park to anybody cause it's absolutely beautiful and clean We have been coming to this caravan park for years

Had an overnight stay with. Stayed in a pet friendly cabin with enclosed patio / yard for our little dog. Staff were friendly and accomodating. Cabin was clean and well presented. Washing machines and dryers on the grounds. Just wish dryer was use of card like washing machine. Bed was comfortable. Slept great. Although was worried we would bang our heads on the wooden shelf above the bed lol. Would stay here again. Thank you.

If I could give them a zero I would no different from the rest of the parks around townsville same shit different amenities😁 but this ones gotta be the most nosey&noisey park in townsville,full on i was packing up old man manager came over yelling and screaming his head off talkin like I'm a child ok when inside grabbed my whale grip he's screamed gun you got a gun right im calling the police like 👍 ok,mate😂 next thing im being handcuffed and there searching my camper,they found nothing,cops looked pretty passed at the manager,let me go and said take care joshi🫡 anyway yeah it's amenities are tiny and dirty pool was green and management was harassing 🤮makes me sick thinking bout the parks in this town,

Coral Coast Tourist Park has fabulous pet friendly accommodation.    Our cabin was spotless, and was so well equipped with a full size fridge, a microwave and a  fabulous oven/grill. The shower was hot with great water pressure.   I can't recommend this accommodation highly enough.   Definitely 5 stars from me.
Reception severvices exellent funny birds feeding at 4 pm

OK called yesterday afternoon just 10 minutes up the road ! Enquiring about a room for 2 to 3 nights with two dogs , no stress no dramas reception lady said book the room now . Can we come & have a look !!! NO give me your card details and I'll hold the room ! WE arrive to have a look 10 minutes later . Waving a hand in the air it's gone goodbye to my Wife ... lol lol lost my business and word of mouth travels....

Too many rules and no pet friendly shaded or air-conditioned areas.|18000 km around Australia and no other park had as many rules as this one. We met two nice couples, we all arrived at the same time and we all said: too many rules here! Too much airplane noise. Mediocre facilities.

Op zich prima camping, sanitair is uitstekend. Maar de locatie is waardeloos: Aan een drukke weg en naast een militaire luchtmachtbasis. Veel, héél veel lawaai dus. Ook helemaal niets in de directe omgeving, geen winkelsgeen restaurants. Volgens mij heb je niet veel keus in Townsville, anders zou ik deze camping mijden.
Great friendly service and highly recommend.
Easy to find and lovely clean comfy room for my overnight stay before heading to the airport
Everything was great and the amenities were very clean! It’s a quiet campground with good spots, though the location is a bit remote.
Very clean. It's great you can leave you van hooked up. Great overnight stay if you are travelling.
Room lovely, fresh and clean. Great location for airport, only a short drive.
Good sites. Can't comment on rooms as I have a van. But they look decent.

My friends and I booked a cabin for our vacation with two beds. After a long drive, we arrived and the person at the reception informed us that unfortunately, they no longer had the cabin with two beds that we had paid for. We checked the available accommodations in town and, of course, there was nothing left for that night. The person at the reception had no solution to offer, a very poor service. One of us had to sleep on the living room floor on blankets as a makeshift mattress. This ruined our stay in the city of Townsville. I would not recommend their service.

Netter Campingplatz aber unser Stellplatz war leider direkt an einer großen viel befahrenen Kreuzung und unmittelbar am Flughafen Gelände. Aufgrund der angrenzenden Militärbasis gab es Fluglärm bis spät in die Nacht

The location is out of town, which was ok. The road noise was a bit annoying throughout the night.
There was a RV bus that pulled up beside our site late at night full of young men.
They were particularly noisy & kept going even after I asked them to be quiet as it was after 11.30pm. The wonderful lady that I phoned was onto it straight away & had it sorted.
The amenities are very clean. The sites really are well planned for a short stay.
Sites are a little tight getting in
Great caravan park with very clean facilities. The showers were so nice and hot!! Only downside is the price it’s quite expensive $55 for 2 people powered site.

Stayed here for 1 night and then again, a few days later for a second night, found it very clean and tidy, I stayed in a cabin: it had everything I needed, nice pool and close to town. Staff helpful and happy. Not much to walk to from here and can be a bit noisy due to the nearby road, a shopping mall close by

Lovely ladies at the reception. Toilet is very clean. Caravan parking might be a bit tight but not challenging. I’m not really sure if you have a caravan more than 6m/ 21 feet, discuss it with the reception. Laundry is clean and coins are ready for exchange in the reception. This place has a swimming pool, small library and tv with Foxtel, and a cooking area. It’s very close with RAAF, you can hear plane but not late at night. We don’t have a problem with the noise, but if you are a light sleeper, it might be a different story.
Friendly staff.  Great location. Amenities for all to share and clean.  Cabins great also. Rest,  relax,  put your feet up.
The park is very well kept. Amenities are very well cleaned. The powered sites are roomy and very easy to reverse  into. .
Friendly and accommodating staff, clean quality accommodation. Location close to airport, however, located near industrial area on a busy road with heavy traffic.
Friendly and clean. Hot showers. Well run. A little expensive.
Great park, of the main highway, so at night pretty quite

Great park, been a couple times good prices for camping and always clean. Lots of space.
Keep up the good work
Nice and tidy van park easy parking clean and tidy toilet and shower block and park not too far from city centre good prices 3
This place is orsome the sites are staggered so you don't look into each other's sites. Grounds are well looked after  lots of shade trees, good service roads, large and very clean amenities.
Great place to stay if you have dogs with you. Staff were good to deal with. The shower and toilet blocks were immaculately clean during our stay.
As usual, great park. Our go to place when in Townsville

Other than the industrial area around you the area is fairly quiet and you get a good sleep. Staff were as helpful as always. I have stayed here quite a few times and don't hesitate recommending it as a good place to stay.
Clean well run caravan resort

Staff were very helpful, site was big enough for our big rig amenities clean and laundry facilities $4 👍
Thank you for our perfect stay

Our ★★★★★ cabin experience matched the advertised rating. Great gardens, shrubs, trees.
Accessibility & disability parking: easy access off Ingham road. i did not see disability services; ask the manager.
Book & check-in: use website
Cabins: basic but well maintained
Powered sites: lots of shade, concreted annex area.
Amenities blocks:  extensive, somewhat dated
Kitchen: BBQs, stove, hot water, boiling water, microwave, dining hall.
Cafe, kiosk, store: few ice creams and basic supplies.
Nearby restaurants: none; you will need to drive
Phone & WiFi speed: 4Mbps us too slow for video. Telstra 5G.
Extras: Pool is small but tidy.
Laundry, iron. Dump point. Gas bottle exchange. Ice. Potable water.
★★ This is a property that focuses on the needs of price conscious travellers.

Extremely clean facilities and grounds. Friendly people, Variety of accommodation to choose from . Great size and shady van sites Easy access to city , beaches and shopping Would recommend for an overnight or longer stay .we will be back. pet friendly

We booked in the pet friendly room for Christmas Day and Boxing Day, staff were quite communicative on how to check in, and the room was great. The room was super clean, and the bed was comfortable. Loved that the pet friendly accomodation had a gate on the verandah so our dog could sit outside with us. Would stay here again if we ever pass through.

A great friendly place to stay, we stayed with our puppy, nice fenced area in unit for puppy.
Great pool and Bbq area. Overall a great place to stay

Excellent cabin.very friendly staff.  Great place for dogs.
Well laid out. Clean and modern. Facilities were 1st class. Will definitely stay again when in Townsville.
Great service at this park 👍

There's nothing Not to like about The Coral Coast Tourist Park.
From the always happy and (very) accomodating ladies in reception, through to the groundspeople and cleaners. Our stay was stress free. Everything was clean, tidy and organised with easy access from every point in the (not too big) park. Being newby's to caravan park life (including our dog), we had the perfect initiation.
For those with big dogs who need more than a lap around the park, you can drive down the end of Mather street (1.3km) to the soccer fields and an off leash dog park. It's a good walk in its self on weekends when there is not too much traffic.
The caravan park is situated at the far end opposite the RAAF Base, so we got to see some awesome exercises with Chinooks,   Globemasters and Super Hornets on a couple of occasions.
From our point of view, this will be our go to park in Townsville for future visits. No need to waste time 'shopping around'.
Thanks Lyn, Hayley and your significant others for making us feel at home. We look forward to seeing you in the not too distant future.

A lovely cabin with excellent hot water pressure and plenty of room for doggos to walk. All the facilities one needs for a very relaxing stay.
Unfortunately, my doggo has a barge in attitude and scares some folks and their dogs.
I also had a motion sensor light that was on the cabin wall next to me as it covered the exit areas. It was on most of the time but not really an issue.
Huge shout out to Hayley for the welcome and to Glen for saving me from the imagined dangersome extra parking areas. I thought they were doing a recce for something unfriendly. My PTSD war service veteran kicked in cos I'm not so brave these days.
Terribly embarrassing lol 😁🤭
Neat tidy park. Close to everything we needed. Nice quiet stay
Lovely staff who really made the stay.  What an awesome idea putting on a free sausage sizzle for guests to attend. We met some lovely people due to that social event - thank you.
Staff went out of their way to accommodate us with our caravan. Amenities excellent great place to stay.

Lovely clean park in a central location to the city, shops, Castle Hill and The Strand. Dog friendly with generous sites that the car and caravan could stay hitched, amenities block has many toilets and shower bays with shower curtains and is kept immaculately clean and laundry is adequate with washers ( 4 × $1 per load) , dryers, iron with board and plenty of rotary hoists for drying clothes. Fairly quiet at night considering it's on Ingham Road and near the airport. My power box was really far away and so I had to drive to Bunnings to get a longer power cord so be prepared.

I’ve stayed here a few times, in a dog friendly cabin, on a powered site and last weekend in the newly renovated disabled cabin. Great park! Fantastic managers and staff. Clean and well maintained facilities and only a short drive to the city centre and shopping centres.
This is my 7th stop on an extended road trip and was pleasantly surprised how impeccably cleaned and maintained the amenities were. It was never in disarray not even once.

Nice Park with very clean amenities. Sites not overly big but lots have cement slabs for Annex. Away from town but easy driving distance and ubers available. Near RAAF base and had 1 night when they must have been doing night training but didn't go too late. Cabins look near and tidy. Recommend this park.

Just don’t get how it’s rated so high. After having nowhere else to stay we landed here. (Just like others we spoke to). With poor water pressure, late night aircraft noise, overflowing bins what’s there to be positive about. At $55 ridiculous dollars a night it’s even more  questionable how the rating is so high.

Well located away from the noise.  Loved the clean and tidy caravan park, they also have timing for the laundry. Not to mention their staff are so friendly and helpful compared to the Discovery on-call person.
Their cleaners also very punctual and friendly.  We'll be back !
Very nice and clean. Close to airport and the Domain shopping complex. Cabin was basic but clean. Highly recommended

Although set in the middle of an industrial area, once settled in you are unaware of the industry all around you. The happy, smiling receptionists made our first impressions great. They were very helpful and informative. The park is well laid out with most sites set at a 45 degree angle making it easy to back into your spot. Lots of trees and shade. Amenities very clean. Will definitely stay here again.

One of the best laid out parks I've ever come across,  clean,neat tidy..such a pleasure to look up at ceiling in amenities block and not see cobwebs and spiders etc hanging down. Ok, it's in an industrial area but once inside one would never know..10 mins drive to shops.This is a winner 🏆

Nice caravan site, clean and ample amenities. Concrete base for awnings.
RAAF base is very close, we seen jets take off and helicopters.
Dog friendly, nice staff.
Has a book and video library. Dump point, and camp kitchen ,laundry, and pool. The camp kitchen is not very conveniently placed though.
We stayed 4 nights. At the price, we would come back.
Lived there years ago am about to live there  once again it is a clean park set out well
Great park in a hood location. We stayed for a couple weeks and thoroughly enjoyed our stay. Staff were super friendly and the park is kept to an exceptional standard.
Would stay here again

Thank you Coral coast tourist park everything was what you advertised it to be beautiful pool, pet friendly lovely clean air-conditioned rooms with remote and 2 tv's  and seperate sleeping quarters for the kids thank you for a friendly and relaxing stay
Wonderful staff and park, handy location in Townsville

We always stay at Coral Coast as it has pet friendly cabins. But we would stay here if just travelling through on our own as it is so well maintained and friendly service. They even have soft toilet paper in the public loos!!!

What an amazing tourist park. The managers were so helpful and accommodating. Never have we had the option to bring our beloved pet inside our cabin in air-conditioned comfort at no extra charge. Everything was spotlessly clean and the gardens were beautifully maintained. Highly recommend and will definitely be back.

Bit of a shock trying to go for a shower at 8:45 both amenities locked and we weren’t issued a key. Residential park people were very helpful. But I’m concerned about going to the amenities block later. Proximity to city good and quietness park residents very good.

I would advise all travellers to stop and stay at the Coral Coast Tourist Park.
From the moment you walk into reception you feel at home.
The manager had turned on the aircon for me, and it was refreshing.
The cabin was clean and very comfortable.
The bed was so comfy.
It was all perfect.
While waiting for a taxi, the manager checked on me and made sure I was fine to reach my destination  the airport.
Speaking of which. If you need accommodation close to the airport,  Coral Coast Tourist Park is the place to stay, so close . No airport noise,  but not a long taxi trip away.
Five star rating in all areas.
Extremely well kept Park clean and spacious facilities.big and comfortable campervan sites. Beautiful garden. The Townsville airport is right next door but it did not bother us at all.

Lovely park, close to everything.
My sister in law lives there, very friendly,  pet friendly,  safe and secure environment, she loves it.
The cabin was very clean. The location is great. I would certainly stay there again.
The staff here are amazingly friendly/helpful. Toilets/showers clean. Cheap washing machines ($4 a load) I enjoyed my stay. Thanks!

Absolutely amazeing,desk staff so helpful,cant do enough,caravan site lovely,permanent person ,Ray,a big help,guideing us in,we keep comeing back,because aestheticly its such a beautifully kept park,and so quite you feel safe here,thankyou to all staff,for there politeness.
We had a great stay here. Amenities were always clean, nice pool & peaceful shaded area under the trees. Thank you.

Nice we'll run park, lots of trees and therefore birds to watch and listen to. Stayed 2 nights. The park itself is quiet, however it is on a main road so some traffic noise to be expected. Easy drive into Townsville centre. Lovely amenities and the laundry even had a laundry basket and trolley to use! Nice touch!
Can recommend.

Well appointed park. Lovely sites. Super friendly & helpful staff 😊
Would have been even better if it was closer to the city but saying this I would most definitely return to this park.
We stayed in a powered site. We stayed here 2 years ago and were very impressed so this is why we returned. We're glad we did.
Great place to stop easy parking.. owners are friendly and helpful

When in Townsville we always stay at the Coral Coast Tourist Park to enjoy its proximity to shopping & other services. The park is very neat & clean with fantastic shower block and swimming pool facilities.

Receptionist was beautiful to work with considering we were travelling last minute with our dog during sporting competitions and V8 weekend approaching.

We stayed in the camping powered site side which was spacious and clean. Nice and quiet. Cost efficient.

The best amenities I’ve had when staying on camping grounds. Clean and spacious considering sharing with everyone on site.
I've stayed in this park 4 times now over the years. I keep Coming back because of the large sites and the clean toilets. It is also easy access to the Strand
Great park near to  city. Clean, massive amenities block. Will definately return. Caravan sites easy to reverse into.

Loved the set up. All bays 45° reverse park. Amens second to none.
Only negative & not park's, is proximity to airport & highway. However,  both are quiet during night.
Great staff & yes I would definitely return. Thankyou.

If you're an aircraft nut, this is the place to stay. Air force take off's and landing quite constant.
Park facilities and amenities are great, swimming pool, library, laundry with dyers.
